name: ctdconverter
title: ctdconverter
summary: Convert CTD files into Galaxy tool and CWL CommandLineTool files
description:
Convert CTD files into Galaxy tool and CWL CommandLineTool files
Common Tool Descriptors (CTDs) are XML documents that represent the inputs,
outputs, parameters of command line tools in a platform-independent way.
.
CTDConverter, given one or more Common Tool Descriptors (CTD) XML files,
generates Galaxy tool wrappers and Common Workflow Language (CWL) Command
Line Tool v1.0 standard descriptions from CTD files.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use CTDConverter because Convert CTD files into Galaxy tool and CWL CommandLineTool files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use CTDConverter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `CTDConverter [FORMAT] [ARGUMENTS ...]` as documented upstream for CTDConverter.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `CTDConverter [FORMAT] -i [INPUT_FILE] -o [OUTPUT_FILE]` as documented upstream for CTDConverter.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `CTDConverter [FORMAT] -i [INPUT_FILES] -o [OUTPUT_DIRECTORY]` as documented upstream for CTDConverter.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair CTDConverter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `CTDConverter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: CTDConverter - Convert CTD files into Galaxy tool and CWL CommandLineTool files
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install ctdconverter. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `CTDConverter [FORMAT] [ARGUMENTS ...]`. Further invocations from upstream: `CTDConverter [FORMAT] -i [INPUT_FILE] -o [OUTPUT_FILE]`; `CTDConverter [FORMAT] -i [INPUT_FILES] -o [OUTPUT_DIRECTORY]`. Convert CTD files into Galaxy tool and CWL CommandLineTool files.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Convert CTD files into Galaxy tool and CWL CommandLineTool files.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: CTDConverter - Convert CTD files into Galaxy tool and CWL CommandLineTool files.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install ctdconverter
Install with: sudo apt install ctdconverter
